Built an internal **AI agent** restructuring planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21%—demonstrating ability to distill dense technical concepts into scalable product capabilities.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level validation program in 4 months, achieving a **94% recovery rate** and surfacing critical hardware defects—establishing a repeatable model for continuous resilience measurement.

Built a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact investments with clear success metrics.
amazon_robotics: Defined legacy OS migration strategy and mapped dependencies across 1,200+ stations, achieving **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot—demonstrating execution in ambiguous, fast-moving environments.

Drove cross-functional alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual release toil.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy—optimizing web presence and audience discovery channels.
